        <;>

        <;>

        <;>

        have h₃₀ : y.spose < q := h₂₉

        have h₃₃ : y.spose ≤ row.poses[1]! := h₁₀

    simp_all [Solution.Row.toPoseInterval, Set.mem_Icc]
    <;>
    (try norm_num at *) <;>
    (try linarith) <;>
    (try contradiction) <;>
    (try nlinarith)
EXCEPTION: TimeoutError:
EXCEPTION: TimeoutError:
